untranslatable_reason: Signal requires optimizable parameters (lookback_period N, percent_change threshold, holding period duration) that cannot be fixed without backtesting. The original signal also references 'large percent change' without a specified magnitude threshold. Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) approximate N-day extremes, and returns approximate percent change, but exact thresholds and lookback periods are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and require empirical optimization.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (default 20-period) to detect N-day highs/lows as they are the closest available indicator for this purpose. Returns indicator approximates large percent change but specific threshold (marked as 0.03 = 3% as placeholder) requires backtesting optimization. Exit condition set to SMA-20 crossover as a reasonable regime-reversal proxy given no explicit holding period was provided. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since the original signal activates on either extremes (long on highs with positive momentum, short on lows with negative momentum).
